_comment: Salon Ultimate API — formal schema contract for KPI Platform. This file is the ground truth for expected field names and types. When Salon Ultimate changes its API, update this file FIRST and review all pipeline code before the next run.
_last_validated: UNCALIBRATED — update when Salon Ultimate API access is granted

endpoint_transactions.description: Service and retail transaction records for a given location and date range

required_fields.notes: Maps to KPI location ID via su_location_map config
Gross revenue — must equal service + product
Guest identifier — used for guest count

optional_fields.notes: Subtract from revenue if applicable per Karissa's definition

endpoint_transactions._note: If record count < 50% of prior week's count, abort and alert before any write.

endpoint_staff.description: Staff/stylist records for a given location

required_fields.notes: Which location this stylist belongs to
Display name used in KPI reports
Filter to active only for KPI calculations

authentication.token_refresh: unknown — document when API access is granted
authentication.rate_limit_header: unknown — document when API access is granted

validation_rules.on_schema_change: Log specific field discrepancy and abort pipeline — do not process malformed data
validation_rules.required_field_missing: ABORT — raise SchemaValidationError with field name and location ID
validation_rules.type_mismatch: WARN and attempt safe cast — if cast fails, ABORT
validation_rules.revenue_integrity_check: If service + product != total (allowing $0.01 rounding), log WARNING
validation_rules.record_count_below_50pct_of_prior_week: ABORT — never overwrite good data with partial data
